failure_modes.text: Abstraction fails when the framework becomes a substitute for understanding the actual causal structure.
failure_modes.source_quote: torture reality so that it fits your models
failure_modes.mitigation: Test multiple frameworks against the same problem; if different cuts yield different insights, the first frame was masking causal structure.

failure_modes.text: High-level synthesis can hide critical assumptions when the team jumps to labels before it has earned them from the evidence.
failure_modes.source_quote: abstraction conflicts with first-principles-thinking when high-level labels hide untested assumptions
failure_modes.mitigation: Strip each label back to the concrete evidence it summarizes; if the label cannot be restated as specific observable facts, it has outrun the data.

failure_modes.text: Pattern compression becomes dangerous when it strips away the specific mechanism that actually changes the decision.
failure_modes.mitigation: Use analogies and concrete examples to ground the abstraction; the compressed model must still point to the operational detail that matters for execution.

premortem_questions.text: What concrete mechanism might this elegant abstraction be hiding?
Are we using this abstraction to clarify the problem or to escape its inconvenient specifics?
premortem_questions.source_quote: torture reality so that it fits your models

premortem_questions.text: What assumptions are embedded in the framework we are treating as neutral?

heuristics.text: Break the problem into logical parts before lifting it into a higher-level synthesis.
heuristics.source_quote: breaking it down into logical parts

heuristics.text: Use abstraction to expose the pattern, but keep checking that the pattern still matches the real machine underneath.
heuristics.source_quote: conceptualize an organization as an integrated machine

heuristics.text: Prefer abstractions that reduce confusion without erasing the causal structure that matters.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on structured synthesis, anti-framework-overreach, and preserving causality during compression.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor philosophy sprawl because the raw source is stronger on abstraction as a usable problem-structuring intervention.
open_questions: The second heuristic compresses several source passages on wholes, interrelationships, and machine-like thinking into one reusable chunk.

allies: The raw ally surface is strongest on systems-thinking, first-principles-thinking, and simplification as later relation material.
antagonists: The raw antagonist pressure is strongest on law-of-the-instrument style overfitting, but only current-vocabulary ids should survive Wave 3.
structured_tensions: The source has an explicit tension block with first-principles-thinking, which cleanly maps into the current target-id surface.
